name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the filling in a food processor and place it in the pie crust. Refrigerate.
2. Melt the cream and the two chocolates together in a double boiler over low heat. Add the brown sugar and continue to stir.
3. Beat the egg yolks until frothy and then add them to the chocolate mixture. Mix thoroughly when ready.
4. Smooth the filling over the peanut butter mixture. Bake until a knife inserted comes out clean. Refrigerate until firm.
